message:
feat(fastapi): comprehensive framework improvements across all crates

Multi-crate improvements to the FastAPI-style Rust framework:

Core (fastapi-core):
- lib.rs: Module organization and re-exports
- middleware.rs: Middleware chain enhancements
- testing.rs: Test utilities and mocks
- tests/: Integration and derive validation tests

HTTP layer (fastapi-http):
- body.rs: Request/response body handling

OpenAPI (fastapi-openapi):
- tests/enum_schema.rs: Enum schema generation tests

Output formatting (fastapi-output):
- dependency_tree.rs: Dependency visualization
- help_display.rs: CLI help formatting
- http_inspector.rs: HTTP debugging tools
- openapi_display.rs: OpenAPI spec rendering
- routing_debug.rs: Route debugging utilities
- detection.rs: Framework detection logic
- tests/: App lifecycle integration tests

Router (fastapi-router):
- trie.rs: Trie-based route matching improvements

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
